mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, chat_type, content_type, content, file_id, extra_data, original_content, status, is_filtered, filtered_words, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{chatType}, #{contentType}, #{content}, #{fileId}, #{extraData}, #{originalContent}, #{status}, #{isFiltered}, #{filteredWords}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET status = 'withdrawn', withdraw_time = NOW(), withdraw_reason = #{reason}, content = '【消息已撤回】', update_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND sender_id = #{senderId} AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, create_time, NOW()) <= 2 AND status != 'withdrawn'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{friendId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_file WHERE (uploader_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{friendId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message_status_history (message_id, status, reason, operator_id, create_time) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{operatorId}, NOW())
